modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't connect to wi-fi on SDVisitor or Eduroam.

full_description_text:  
I can't connect to wi-fi.  
I see SDSecure or Eduroam but no Internet.  
Also, it drops every 20 minutes.  
How do I disconnect from SDVisitor?
short_description: Can't connect to wi-fi on SDVisitor or Eduroam.
description:
